body:
## Summary
Redesigned the lobby page into a fantasy-style game dashboard with animated visual effects and improved UI layout.
## Changes
- Rebuilt the lobby page layout and section structure
- Added animated video background for the main lobby scene
- Added fantasy-themed visual assets and icons
- Improved leaderboard and profile card layouts
- Updated season panel styling and typography
- Added PvE card visual effects and glow styling
- Refined spacing, alignment, and responsive layout
- Updated authenticated navbar behavior inside the lobby
- Removed unfinished room join functionality
- Added lobby asset folder and supporting media files
## UI Improvements
- Glassmorphism card design
- Dark fantasy visual theme
- Animated background integration
- Improved visual hierarchy and readability
- More game-like dashboard experience
## Notes
- Backend auth and routing logic were not modified
- Current focus is desktop layout and visual polish
- Assets are stored in `frontend/public/lobby`

## Summary
重构了 Lobby 页面，将其改造成更偏游戏大厅风格的幻想题材 UI，并增加了动态视觉效果与页面布局优化。
## Changes
- 重构 Lobby 页面整体布局与区域结构
- 添加动态视频背景作为大厅主视觉
- 增加幻想风格图标与视觉素材
- 优化 Leaderboard 与 Profile 卡片布局
- 调整 Season 区域样式与字体效果
- 为 PvE 卡片增加发光与特效风格
- 优化页面间距、对齐与响应式布局
- 更新登录后 Lobby 页面顶部导航逻辑
- 移除未完成的 Join Room 功能区域
- 新增 lobby 相关资源文件与媒体素材
## UI Improvements
- 使用玻璃拟态（Glassmorphism）卡片风格
- 深色幻想风格主题
- 动态背景视频融合
- 更清晰的视觉层级与可读性
- 更接近游戏大厅的交互体验
## Notes
- 未修改后端认证与路由逻辑
- 当前主要针对桌面端布局与视觉效果优化
- 资源文件位于 `frontend/public/lobby`

reviews.body: LGTM, frontend-only UI redesign, no conflicts with backend.

title: feat: redesign fantasy lobby page UI
